BoardRow.title: BoardRow
BoardRow.description:
One main. A MISSING instrument is a row of NULLS, not an absent row (GOLD-only board is
visible). oi_state is classify_oi_state (scan.py:351), NOT the dead oi_daily.oi_state column.

GenerateResponse.title: GenerateResponse
GenerateResponse.description:
Superset of the two real /generate variants (started run / already_complete). See
CONTRACT.md for the two discriminated shapes; document-only, so the real bytes pass through.

KiteRefreshResponse.title: KiteRefreshResponse
KiteRefreshResponse.description: POST /kite/refresh — the one-call token exchange result + the refreshed kite source dot.
